description: Hermes hackathon demo: supervised GTM agent that researches, spends, provisions monetization, and reports ROI.

userStories.title: Hackathon command center landing UI
userStories.description: As a judge, I need to immediately understand that this is a serious operator-grade revenue agent, not a chatbot.
userStories.notes: Hero, agent swarm, mission objective, guardrails, and revenue rail implemented.

userStories.title: Interactive GTM workflow simulator
userStories.description: As an operator, I can step through the revenue workflow from objective to report.
userStories.notes: Six stages implemented with progress bar and expanding audit trail.

userStories.title: Budget and Stripe rail visualization
userStories.description: As a judge, I can see how the agent spends safely and creates monetization.
userStories.notes: Spend gate, approval state, Stripe-style checkout modal, and ROI metrics implemented.
